title: Custom routed-model metadata registry
description: Canonical, versioned metadata for foreign models reached through an LLM gateway (claude-model-router → a translating proxy). Claude Code cannot infer a foreign model's context capacity behind a gateway, so this registry records the provider-advertised capability, the Claude Code client budget, route-specific EMPIRICAL verification, and the fallback policy — each capacity claim carrying its own provenance. Structural rules live here; semantic rules the schema cannot express (provenance sufficiency, >200K strict inequality against the cited evidence, extended-mode gating) are enforced by bin/custom-model-metadata.mjs.

schemaVersion.description: Registry format version. The validator rejects any version it does not understand.

provenance.description: Where a claim comes from. Every capacity or verification claim must carry one.

kind.description: provider-documentation = the model provider's own docs (API capability). harness-documentation = Claude Code docs (client budgeting/suffix behavior). operator-observation = a human-recorded observation (e.g. /context). empirical-probe = a recorded probe run against the live route.

authority.description: The issuing authority, e.g. 'OpenAI', 'Anthropic (Claude Code docs)', 'v-383 live probe'.

evidence.description: Repo-relative path to a committed evidence artifact when kind is operator-observation or empirical-probe.

retrievedAt.description: ISO date the claim was retrieved or observed (YYYY-MM-DD).

gateway.description: The translating proxy that serves this route, e.g. 'CLIProxyAPI'.

kind.description: Distinguishes an OpenAI API-key route from a Codex/ChatGPT-subscription OAuth route. These have DIFFERENT capacity semantics and must not be conflated.

upstreamModelId.description: The model id the upstream expects — must be suffix-free (no [1m]).

status.description: pending-live-probe = not yet proven; verified = a recorded probe accepted a request above the 200K gateway floor; rejected = the route refused/truncated the oversized request.

verifiedInputTokensAtLeast.description: Proven lower bound: the observed native input-token usage of the accepted request. Null until verified.

observedWireModelId.description: The model id observed on the wire to the upstream — must equal upstreamModelId and contain no [1m].

probe.description: Repo-relative path to the probe helper that produced the evidence.

evidence.description: Repo-relative path to the committed evidence artifact.

extendedContextSuffix.description: The suffix that opts this model into the extended client budget. Claude Code strips it before the request reaches the provider.

budgetedInputTokens.description: The context budget Claude Code applies to an extended session (the 1M client window).

preferredContextMode.description: Which mode the docs/tooling recommend by default. 'extended' is gated on a verified route (enforced by the validator, not the schema).

status.description: pending-observation = threshold unknown; documented = taken from Claude Code docs for the 1M window (harness-documentation provenance); observed = measured via /context for this route.

expectedUsableInputTokens.description: Observed auto-compaction threshold — the usable window before compaction. Null until observed. Must not exceed budgetedInputTokens.

autoCompactWindowEnv.description: The env var that overrides the threshold (documentation pointer only, never proof).

modelId.description: The suffix-free model id to fall back to (one command / one session).

scope.description: The fallback is per-session; it never mutates a global default.
